nasb.text: On the next day, as they were on their way and approaching the city, Peter went up on the housetop about the sixth hour to pray.

esv.text: The next day, as they were on their journey and approaching the city, Peter went up on the housetop about the sixth hour to pray.

cnv.text: 第二天，大約正午，他們走近那座城的時候，彼得上了房頂去禱告。

ccb.text: 第二天中午，他们快要到达约帕时，彼得上屋顶去祷告。

csbs.text: 第二天，当他们赶路快到约帕的时候，大约中午十二点，彼得上屋顶去祷告。
